title: Instagram Profile Intel
description: Enter Instagram usernames. Get 25+ layers of intel per profile — bio emails (MX-verified), phones, multi-link bios, engagement quality, account age, posting patterns, hashtag campaigns, top/worst posts, cross-platform presence (8 platforms), tech stack of their website, pincode, country code, bio link health, profile pic metadata, and more. No Instagram login required.

usernames.title: Instagram usernames
usernames.description: List of Instagram usernames to analyze (without the @ symbol). Examples: 'zomato', 'biryanibykilo', 'plumgoodness'. Or paste full Instagram URLs — we auto-extract the username.

enrichLevel.title: Enrichment level
enrichLevel.description: Basic = profile + bio contacts + account age + IG capabilities. Full = adds engagement scoring, posting pattern, communication style, hashtag campaigns, top/worst posts, collabs, niche detection.
enumTitles: Basic — identity + counts + bio contacts + account age + IG capabilities
Full — adds engagement + posting + style + hashtag campaigns + top posts + collabs (recommended)

checkCrossPlatform.title: Check cross-platform username presence (8 platforms)
checkCrossPlatform.description: Detect if the same username exists on Threads, GitHub, Reddit, YouTube, Pinterest, Spotify, Twitter/X, Facebook. Adds ~3-8 seconds per profile.
checkCrossPlatform.sectionDescription: Toggle individual enrichments. Disable to speed up runs.

enrichExternalUrl.title: Fetch external URL og:metadata + emails/phones + tech stack
enrichExternalUrl.description: For each profile's external URL, fetch og:title/description/image, extra emails/phones from the website body, and detect tech stack (Shopify, Wix, Stripe, etc.). Adds ~1-3 sec per profile.

expandMultiLinkBio.title: Expand multi-link bios (linktr.ee, beacons.ai, bio.link, etc.)
expandMultiLinkBio.description: When the external URL is a multi-link bio service, fetch the page and extract all child links. Adds ~1-2 sec per profile (only when applicable).

validateEmailsViaMx.title: MX-validate extracted emails (DNS check)
validateEmailsViaMx.description: For each email extracted from the bio, run a DNS MX lookup to verify the domain accepts email. Free, fast, no extra HTTP — uses DNS. Catches typos and fake domains.

checkBioLinkHealth.title: Health-check bio links (200 vs 404)
checkBioLinkHealth.description: HEAD each bio_link URL to detect dead/broken links. Useful for finding accounts with abandoned link trees. Adds ~1-2 sec per profile.

fetchProfilePicMeta.title: Fetch profile picture metadata (size, type)
fetchProfilePicMeta.description: HEAD the profile picture URL to get dimensions, content-type, file size. Adds ~0.5 sec per profile.

useResidentialProxy.title: Use Apify Residential Proxy
useResidentialProxy.description: Recommended ON. Rotates residential IPs to avoid Instagram + cross-platform rate limits. Turn off only if you have your own IP rotation set up.

requestDelayMs.title: Delay between profiles (ms)
requestDelayMs.description: Polite delay between Instagram profile calls. Default 1500ms balances speed vs rate-limit safety. Lower = faster but more likely to hit 429.

maxRetries.title: Max retries per username
maxRetries.description: How many times to retry a failed request before giving up on that username.
